candidate_definition_hints.text: Bosun is a time series alerting framework developed by Stack Exchange. Scollector is a metric collection agent. Learn more at [bosun.org](http://bosun.org).

candidate_glosses.text: Bosun is a time series alerting framework developed by Stack Exchange. Scollector is a metric collection agent. Learn more at [bosun.org](http://bosun.org).
